column1: Hey Sofia, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
Which destination were we lookin at?
Nicee. I was just out there
How many ppl we got so far for the group?
Dope, we all from the same school? I'll put together a group rate for y'all
yes, all from the same school
Okay bet. Got you, putting this together for y'all right now
How soon were you lookin to to start getting things situated?
no major rush we just want to get a picture of costs and logistics to start planning!
Got it! Happy to help. Did you have an idea of how much you're looking to spend? Or not really
we're looking to not spend any more than $2000 max per person, so like $10,000 total as a hard line but hopefully less lol
Lol yea def will be less, with flights included too
Which airport would you be looking to fly out of?
Hey morning okay dope I'll see what I can pull. It may be cheaper to get flights separately on your own
For dates, is March 14-19 aight? 5 night trip. That's what most do
Perfect. Cool if I send it all through email? It's a little long for text lol
Bet! Did that email come through? Sent a few mins ago
Yes it came through! thanks so much, i'll look it through with the group and decide on a plan
Cool sounds good! If anyone has any questions text me

Since it looks like having 4 people to a room is the better deal, would it be best to increase our group size to 8 and have 2 rooms? is there availability for that? Also, what are the benefits of the travel protection insurance?
hey morning yea we can do 2 rooms for sure
and the travel protection insurance I feel is mostly good to have if you think theres a slight chance you may need to cancel
its a cancel for any reason service that covers up to 75% of your trip payments
here are deeper details if you want to read through
hey sofia hows the group feelin about the options so far?
We are excited, just currently working on confirming every person in our group and making sure we have 8 who can go before we try to book
gotcha, okay cool! let me know what questions I can answer for anyone. here to help
also just so you know, if theres atleast a core 4 that are 100% down, we can always get them reserved and then add to the reservation once the other 4 are ready
that way whoever is ready gets to lock in the current prices
hey hey, how things going getting the group together for spring break?
hey Sofia any word on what everyone wants to do?
We definitely have at least 4 who are down
okay word. lets get the 4 reserved at least so that you can lock in the current rate before things go up. we can add the rest as we go
if y'all cool with that ofc
just sent the link to everyone
Okay dope! I just adjusted the payment plan on that one so it shows today
hey what's up, hows everything lookin?
hey lmk if anyone has any questions anytime!
is Jaylin on the same flight as any of you? we just need her flight info for the airport transportation
also did y'all want to add any party pass tickets to your package?
We are all on the same flight! i texted everyone the other day to fill out the info but idk if she has yet.
do you think it's worth it to add one? we will talk about it as a group
okay all good I'll add it in for her
and yea 100% worth it. the resort is cool but can def can get quiet most nights
comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort hosted nightclub events
venues like D'Cave, Coco Bongo, HOF, Vaquita, Mandala, Mandala Beach, and more
with the recent cartel unrest is it safe to be going off resort?

completely up to your comfort level. the resort and nightclubs are in the hotel zone of cancun which has high security and a lot of tourists around. we have groups out there now that have been just fine
